research_boundary: Research use only. Not for diagnosis, treatment, cure claims, prescribing, clinical deployment, regulatory compliance, or drug-safety certification.
stub_provenance_note: Stub canned hit for SCN5A (Nav1.5/INa). High hERG_IC50_uM (38.5 uM) indicates acceptable safety margin at this stage. ADMET from Chemprop v2 stub; pIC50 from Boltz-2 stub. Real values require Runpod GPU adapters.
